title: Dyoma
summary: Dyoma (Russian: Дёма) is a rural locality (a village) in Kochyovskoye Rural Settlement, Kochyovsky District, Perm Krai, Russia. The population was 17 as of 2010. The village has 3 streets.
text:
Dyoma (Russian: Дёма) is a rural locality (a village) in Kochyovskoye Rural Settlement, Kochyovsky District, Perm Krai, Russia. The population was 17 as of 2010. The village has 3 streets.

Geography
Dyoma is located 20 km northwest of Kochyovo (the district's administrative centre) by road. Vorobyovo is the nearest rural locality.
